name: Page Link Extractor
description: Extract URLs from homepage navigation, header, footer, and main content areas

options.name: max_urls
options.label: Maximum URLs per site
options.description: Limit how many URLs to extract per homepage.

options.name: include_footer
options.label: Include footer links
options.description: Extract links from footer area. Useful for parent company, licensing, and legal pages.

options.name: include_body
options.label: Include body content links
options.description: Extract links from main page body, not just navigation elements. Finds more URLs but includes lower-signal links.

options.name: same_domain_only
options.label: Same domain only
options.description: Only include links pointing to the same domain as the homepage.
